title: KeeKee's SMP Complete
description: A vanilla enhanced modpack made for the streamer Keeksthebeast's SMP.
body:
# Description
A vanilla enhanced modpack made for the streamer Keeksthebeast's SMP. The Pack comes in 4 versions. Each version of the pack comes with optifine parity and optimization mods. It also contains any mod that is necessary to have full features on the server (I.E. Armor Statues and Simple Voice Chat).


# Versions

## [Complete](https://modrinth.com/modpack/keekees-smp-compete)
Has every mod from all other version of the pack giving you a complete experience. This includes visual mods and utility mods.

## [Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/keekees-smp-lite)
The lightest version only containing optimization mods and optifine parity mods. It also contains any mod that is necessary to have full features on the server (I.E. Armor Statues and Simple Voice Chat). The pack runs smoother and with higher fps then vanilla.

## [Visual](https://modrinth.com/modpack/keekees-smp-visual)
Contains all the base mods of Lite version with added visual and sound mods. This version is for those that don't care for the utility mods of the utility pack but want a more beautiful Minecraft then Lite.

## [Utility](https://modrinth.com/modpack/keekees-smp-utility)
Contains all the base mods of Lite version with added utility mods. This version is for those that want more functionality then the lite version of the game. It includes mods like litematica, tweakeroo, minihud and other mods to enhance gameplay and functionality of the game.
